name: Rat Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Represents fertility and wealth. Seen on New Year cards (Nengajo) during the start of the cycle in Japan.

name: Ox Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Symbolizes diligence and perseverance. A revered animal in Shinto shrines like Tenmangu in Japan.

name: Tiger Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Represents power and protection. Often used in traditional art and protective charms in Japan.

name: Rabbit Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Symbolizes elegance and gentleness. Associated with the moon and folklore across Japan.

name: Dragon Year Zodiac Japan
desc: A mythical creature representing immense luck and power in the cultural heritage of Japan.

name: Snake Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Represents wisdom and financial luck. Linked to the goddess Benzaiten in Japanese shrines in Japan.

name: Horse Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Symbolizes energy and speed. High cultural value in Shinto rituals and festivals in Japan.

name: Sheep Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Represents peace and family harmony. A common motif for New Year greeting stamps in Japan.

name: Monkey Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Symbolizes cleverness. Famous for the 'Three Wise Monkeys' carving at Nikko Toshogu in Japan.

name: Rooster Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Represents punctuality and the dawn. Found in many agricultural and mythological contexts in Japan.

name: Dog Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Symbolizes loyalty and protection. Popularized by famous stories like Hachiko in the history of Japan.

name: Boar Year Zodiac Japan
desc: Specifically the 'Wild Boar' in the Japanese version of the zodiac. Symbolizes courage and strength in Japan.
